units.sectionsDetected: {count, plural, one {# section detected} other {# sections detected}}
units.fieldsImported: Imported {sections} sections with {count} fields in total
units.stepsRemaining: {count, plural, one {# step} other {# steps}} left until your profile is complete.

page.error: Profile could not be loaded. Please try again later.

empty.about: Write a profile summary — Applo’s most important input

profileCheck.title: Profile check
profileCheck.why: <bold>Why?</bold> Every completed field makes Applo’s AI applications more accurate and unlocks more suitable jobs.

privacy.title: Your data, your control
privacy.body: Applo uses your profile only to write your applications. You decide for each application which details are included.

hints.contact: Name and email go into every application.
hints.address: Your location helps match nearby roles.
hints.about: My most important input for your cover letters.

coach.complete: Great, {name}! Your profile is <bold>100%</bold> complete. Now I can write your applications as accurately as possible.
coach.intro: Hi, I’m <bold>Applo</bold> — your profile coach. The more I know about you, the better I can tailor your applications. Let’s get your profile ready.
coach.identityComplete: Your <bold>contact details</bold> go straight into every application. Great — everything is complete.
coach.identityMissing: Your <bold>contact details</bold> go straight into every application. Add your phone number for more responses.
coach.about: Your <bold>profile summary</bold> is my most important input. Write 2–3 sentences about your strengths — I’ll turn it into a tailored cover letter for each role.
coach.experience: Concrete achievements with <bold>numbers</bold> are most convincing. I automatically choose the most relevant points for each application.
coach.skills: Recruiters filter by <bold>skills</bold> first. The more complete your list, the better I can match you to suitable jobs.
coach.education: Your <bold>education</bold> rounds out the profile and fits more job filters.

tour.identity: Let’s start at the top: I copy your <bold>contact details</bold> 1:1 into every application. A phone number helps you get more responses.
tour.about: Your <bold>profile summary</bold> is my most important input. 2–3 sentences about your strengths are enough — I’ll tailor the wording for each role.
tour.experience: For <bold>work experience</bold>, concrete achievements with numbers count. I automatically highlight what fits each role.
tour.skills: Maintain your <bold>skills</bold> — recruiters filter by them first, and I can match you more precisely to suitable roles.
tour.education: Your <bold>education</bold> rounds out the profile and unlocks more job filters.
tour.projects: With <bold>projects</bold>, you show what you can do in practice — especially powerful without long work experience. I reference them where they fit the role.
tour.certificates: Finally, your <bold>certificates</bold> — they officially prove your skills. I mention them where they make a difference for the role.

cvUpload.title: Upload résumé
cvUpload.description: Upload your résumé — we’ll read it and fill your profile automatically.

inline.skillPlaceholder: e.g. project management, patient care, Excel…
inline.askLanguageLevel: — How well do you speak this language?

basic.title: Basic information
basic.summaryDescription: A short summary for your profile.

cards.skillsDescription: What are you especially good at?

onboarding.description: Upload your résumé to fill your profile automatically — or enter the most important details manually.
onboarding.parseFallback: We couldn’t read your résumé completely. Please fill in the most important fields manually.
onboarding.nameRequired: Please enter at least your name.
onboarding.uploadDescription: We analyze your résumé and fill your profile automatically.
onboarding.analyzingDescription: This can take a few seconds.
onboarding.manualDescription: Fill in only the most important fields. You can add more later at any time.
onboarding.skillsHelp: Your most important skills, separated by commas.
onboarding.summaryPlaceholder: e.g. Experienced project manager with 5 years in organizational development...
onboarding.recommendation: Summary and skills significantly improve the quality of your applications.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Group your competencies into categories — they appear this way in your résumé
skills.skillPlaceholder: e.g. project management, patient care, SAP …
skills.noSkillsInCategory: No skills in this category yet.
skills.uncategorizedHelp: Skills without a category appear in the résumé without a heading.
skills.emptyDescription: Create categories like “Core competencies” or “Software” and add your skills.

experience.title: Work experience
experience.emptyDescription: Add your previous roles to complete your profile.
experience.deleteConfirm: Do you really want to delete this entry? This cannot be undone.
experience.descriptionHelp: This description appears in generated résumés.
experience.titlePlaceholder: e.g. project manager, nurse, sales manager

errors.title: Please enter a job title
errors.dateOrder: End date must be after the start date

education.title: Education
education.emptyDescription: Add your education to complete your profile.
education.deleteConfirm: Do you really want to delete this entry? This cannot be undone.
education.institutionPlaceholder: e.g. University of Applied Sciences Munich

errors.yearOrder: End year must be after the start year

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.emptyDescription: Add your professional certifications to support your qualifications.
certificates.deleteConfirm: Do you really want to delete this certificate? This cannot be undone.
certificates.name: Certificate name

errors.name: Please enter a certificate name
errors.dateOrder: Expiry date must be after the issue date

projects.title: Projects
projects.emptyDescription: Show your personal and professional projects to strengthen your profile.
projects.deleteConfirm: Do you really want to delete this project? This cannot be undone.
projects.name: Project name
projects.tagPlaceholder: e.g. Excel, project planning, quality management …
projects.namePlaceholder: e.g. Launch of a new customer portal
projects.descriptionPlaceholder: What did you do? What was your role?

errors.name: Please enter a project name
errors.dateOrder: End date must be after the start date

languages.title: Languages
languages.emptyDescription: Add your language skills to complete your profile.

resumeImport.uploadDescription: Upload your résumé to fill your profile automatically.
resumeImport.previewDescription: Choose which data should be imported.
resumeImport.analyzingDescription: This can take a few seconds.

resumeImport.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one section to import

photo.invalidType: Please upload a JPEG or PNG image.
photo.tooLarge: The photo is too large (max. 2 MB).
photo.hint: JPEG/PNG, max. 2 MB. Appears only in résumés where you enable it in the editor.
